Info.ToolboxConfigModel: {"entries":[{"content":{"appGalleryLabel":{"content":{"categoryID":"Deployment_Category_c3e12571-5728-46a4-bfbd-a19d345b0b3b","labelID":"Deployment_ToolboxAppGalleryFiles_c3e12571-5728-46a4-bfbd-a19d345b0b3b"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ProjectLabel","uuid":"cdc161d9-341d-4f4e-8ab2-01616a28862f"},"authorName":"Austin Decker","description":"Integrated debugging toolkit for MATLAB uihtml components. Seamlessly reroutes JavaScript console messages to the MATLAB Command Window and injects Eruda dev tools for on-page inspection, streamlining web-based UI development within MATLAB.","gettingStartedGuideLabel":{"content":{"categoryID":"Deployment_Category_c3e12571-5728-46a4-bfbd-a19d345b0b3b","labelID":"Deployment_GettingStartedGuideFile_c3e12571-5728-46a4-bfbd-a19d345b0b3b"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ProjectLabel","uuid":"b61c5ea7-e77d-47c4-80e2-96718fdd64df"},"maxRelease":"R2025b","minRelease":"R2023a","outputFileName":"uihtml-debugger.mltbx","outputFolder":"uihtml-debugger/release","summary":"Integrated debugging toolkit for MATLAB uihtml components.","supportedPlatforms":["Windows","Linux","Mac","MatlabOnline"],"toolboxFolder":"toolbox","toolboxImgLabel":{"content":{"categoryID":"Deployment_Category_c3e12571-5728-46a4-bfbd-a19d345b0b3b","labelID":"Deployment_ToolboxImageFile_c3e12571-5728-46a4-bfbd-a19d345b0b3b"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ProjectLabel","uuid":"cba938fa-2112-4b02-a557-02cbc52d3a25"},"toolboxName":"uihtml-debugger","toolboxVersion":"1.0.1","uniqueId":"727cba77-dcad-4e6f-935f-a6f46ecca561"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ToolboxConfiguration","uuid":"3971e3f7-8c96-4f0c-8b9a-1d0226bd88a7"},{"content":{},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ProjectStateValidationIssueList","uuid":"9de63ed6-2eda-4cfa-b2c4-8b45db8ffe10"}],"packageUris":["http://schema.mathworks.com/mf0/deployment_toolbox_model/1.0.0"],"version":"1.0"}
